name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Run Claude Code as an independent reviewer for Codex-managed changes.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code to review the current git diff.
interface.longDescription: CC Plugin Codex adds a Claude-backed review workflow for Codex. The bundled claude-review skill runs Claude Code in review-only mode against the current git diff, shows the findings, and then lets Codex address actionable issues.
defaultPrompt: Run claude-review for the current diff.
